arxiv_papers.title: Deterministic positioning of circular Bragg gratings using atomic force lithography for high-performance quantum dot light sources
arxiv_papers.snippet: Semiconductor quantum dots (QDs) grown by molecular beam epitaxy are excellent quantum emitters, but their random spatial distribution hinders deterministic coupling to optical microcavities. arxiv_papers.title: A step-by-step workflow to extract the genuine circular dichroism of thin films
arxiv_papers.snippet: Circular Dichroism (CD) spectroscopy has evolved from a purely solution based method towards a powerful tool in the analysis of chiral thin films.
